message.content:
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0

interface Supplier <<interface>> {
  ~find(productName:String):Product
  ~getProducts():Product[]
  ~getNumberOfProducts():int
  ~getName():String
  ~getDescription(prefix:String):String
}

abstract class SupplierBase {
  -supplierName:String
  --
  +SupplierBase(sn:String)
  +getName():String
  +toString():String
  +getDescription(prefix:String):String
}

class OneProductProducer {
  +OneProductProducer(sn:String,p:Product)
  +find(pn:String):Product
  +getProducts():Product[]
  +getNumberOfProducts():int
  +getDescription(prefix:String):String
}

class Producer {
  -template:Product[]
  --
  +Producer(sn:String,ps:Product)
  +find(pn:String):Product
  +getProducts():Product[]
  +getNumberOfProducts():int
  +getDescription(prefix:String):String
}

class Retailer {
  +Retailer(name:String)
  +getNumberOfProducts():int
  +find(productName:String):Product
  +getProducts():Product[]
  +add(s:Supplier):Retailer
  +getDescription(prefix:String):String
}

class Product

SupplierBase ..|> Supplier

OneProductProducer --|> SupplierBase
Producer --|> SupplierBase
Retailer --|> SupplierBase

OneProductProducer o-- "product" Product
Producer o-- "*\nproducts" Product

Retailer o-- "*\nsuppliers" Supplier
@enduml
